name: Changsha Broad Homes Industrial Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Changsha Broad Homes Industrial Group Co., Ltd. engages in the prefabricated concrete (PC) buildings and services business in the People's Republic of China. It operates through two segments, PC Unit Manufacturing and PC Equipment Manufacturing. The PC Unit Manufacturing segment designs, manufactures, and sells PC units. The PC Equipment Manufacturing segment manufactures and sells PC equipment and related services. The company also offers technological promotion; and engineering design and consultation services, as well as research, develops, manufactures, and sells intelligent technology. In addition, it manufactures and sells bathroom; intelligent equipment; and cement product and other construction materials. The company was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Changsha, the People's Republic of China.
